sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT toDecimal64OrDefault(value, 5, CAST('-1', 'Decimal64(5)')) AS decimal_value FROM test_decimal;
UPDATE test_decimal SET value = toString(toDecimal64OrDefault(value, 2, '0')) WHERE value LIKE '%.%';
SELECT toTypeName(toDecimal64OrDefault('1.9999', 2)) AS type, COUNT(*) FROM test_decimal GROUP BY type;
